hero.subtitle: Your trusted source for authentic Indonesian food products in Taiwan. From beloved snacks to essential cooking ingredients, we bring the taste of home to you.

about.title: Mahkota Taiwan
about.description: Mahkota Taiwan is Taiwan's leading Indonesian food distributor, proudly bridging Indonesian culture and Taiwanese daily life since 2021. With over 26 carefully curated product lines — spanning instant food, snacks, cooking spices, beverages, and household essentials — we serve more than 1 million customers through 300+ partner stores across the island. All our products are Halal certified, ensuring the highest standards of quality and trust. Backed by a reliable supply chain and comprehensive logistics network, Mahkota Taiwan is more than just a distributor — we are a cultural ambassador, bringing the authentic taste of home to every Indonesian community in Taiwan.
about.mission: Our mission is to bridge cultures through food, providing high-quality Indonesian products with reliable distribution across Taiwan.
about.label: Who We Are
about.highlight1: Halal certified products ensuring quality and trust

values.title: Our Values
values.qualityFirstDesc: Every product is carefully selected and tested to meet the highest standards of quality before reaching our shelves.
values.culturalBridgeDesc: We bridge the gap between Indonesian heritage and Taiwanese daily life, bringing authentic flavors to every home.
values.communityDesc: Building a strong community of over 1 million customers who trust us to deliver the tastes of home.
values.integrityDesc: Operating with transparency and trust in every partnership and transaction, ensuring lasting relationships built on mutual respect.

2021.title: Founded
2021.description: Mahkota Taiwan was established with a vision to bring authentic Indonesian products to Taiwan.

2022.title: 100+ Stores
2022.description: Expanded our network to over 100 retail partner stores across northern Taiwan.

2023.title: 300+ Stores
2023.description: Reached 300+ partner stores island-wide, becoming the leading Indonesian product distributor.

2024.title: Expanded Product Lines
2024.description: Introduced new product categories including beverages, snacks, and household essentials.

2025.title: 1 Million+ Customers
2025.description: Proudly serving over 1 million customers, a testament to our quality and community trust.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How can I order Mahkota Taiwan products?
faq.a1: You can order our products through any of our 300+ partner stores across Taiwan. Check our store locator to find the nearest location, or contact us directly for bulk orders.
faq.a2: Yes! We offer delivery services for bulk and wholesale orders. For individual purchases, please visit any of our partner stores. Contact our team for delivery schedules and minimum order quantities.
faq.q3: How can I become a retail partner?
faq.a3: We're always looking for new retail partners! Please send us an email at mahkotataiwan@gmail.com or call us at +886-2-26099118 with your store details, and our partnership team will get back to you within 2 business days.
faq.q4: What types of products do you distribute?
faq.a4: We distribute a wide range of authentic Indonesian products including instant noodles, seasonings, sauces, beverages, snacks, cooking essentials, and household items. We carry 26+ carefully selected product lines.
faq.q5: Can I request a specific Indonesian product?
faq.a5: Absolutely! We welcome product suggestions from our community. Please reach out via email or our social media channels with the product details, and we'll do our best to source it for you.
